task_description: Debug the following multi-file Python application for a simple caching HTTP client. There are bugs across files that cause cache misses, incorrect headers, and memory issues.

test_cases.name: Cache returns expired entries
test_cases.description: cache.get() returns expired entries instead of treating them as misses
test_cases.expected: Expired entries should return None and be cleaned up

test_cases.name: Default headers mutated
test_cases.description: _build_headers modifies self.default_headers dict when merging extra_headers
test_cases.expected: default_headers should not be modified between requests

test_cases.name: Missing json import in api.py
test_cases.description: api.py uses json.loads but does not import json

test_cases.name: Auth headers missing on list_resources
test_cases.description: list_resources does not pass auth headers, unlike other methods
